Package org.eventb.internal.core.parser

Class Pattern

java.lang.Object
org.eventb.internal.core.parser.Pattern
public class Pattern extends Object
Support for parsing a pattern of a lambda expression. This class is used by the mathematical parser to build a lambda pattern, while checking its well-formedness. Most notably, it ensures that names occurring in the pattern are pairwise distinct.

To use this class, the parser calls methods declParsed(BoundIdentDecl) and mapletParsed(SourceLocation) during the parse. Once the pattern has been fully parsed, declarations are available through getDecls() and the final pattern (made of bound identifiers) is built and returned by getPattern().

If a name is duplicated, an error is added to the parser result passed to the constructor, and the erroneous declaration is replaced by a dummy expression (placeholder), to support error recovery in the parser.
